/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/backend_db.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/backend_db.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o backend_db  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib/snode.c/web/http:/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/snode.c/web/http/libsnodec-http-server-express-legacy-in.so.1.0.1 /usr/local/lib/libsnodec-db-mariadb.so.1.0.1 /usr/local/lib/snode.c/web/http/libsnodec-http-server-express.so.1.0.1 /usr/local/lib/snode.c/web/http/libsnodec-http-server.so.1.0.1 /usr/local/lib/snode.c/web/http/libsnodec-http.so.1.0.1 -lmagic /usr/local/lib/libsnodec-net-in-stream-legacy.so.1.0.1 /usr/local/lib/libsnodec-net-in-stream.so.1.0.1 /usr/local/lib/libsnodec-net-in-phy-stream.so.1.0.1 /usr/local/lib/libsnodec-net-in-phy.so.1.0.1 /usr/local/lib/libsnodec-net-in.so.1.0.1 /usr/local/lib/libsnodec-net.so.1.0.1 /usr/local/lib/libsnodec-core-socket-stream-legacy.so.1.0.1 /usr/local/lib/libsnodec-core-socket-stream.so.1.0.1 /usr/local/lib/libsnodec-core-socket.so.1.0.1 /usr/local/lib/libsnodec-core.so.1.0.1 /usr/local/lib/libsnodec-utils.so.1.0.1 /usr/local/lib/libsnodec-logger.so.1.0.1 -ldl -lmariadb -Wl,-rpath-link,/usr/local/lib
